input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Generated tests should avoid YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON resource examples unless they intentionally add the matching Hoplite format module; core only has built-in properties parsing.
Version 3.0 changes environment variable mapping semantics, but this is test-code behavior rather than required external environment setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Hoplite core is self-contained for meaningful tests: the resolved artifact brings its Kotlin/coroutines dependencies transitively and includes built-in property/map/system/environment sources plus the properties parser. Documentation notes extra Hoplite format modules only when testing YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON file parsing, which is not required to cover hoplite-core behavior.
